title: "committedFactJournalCursorCodec()"
description: "Build the default domain-neutral cursor codec for one named fact stream."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Build the default domain-neutral cursor codec for one named fact stream.

## Import

```ts
import { committedFactJournalCursorCodec } from "@graphrefly/ts/committed-facts";
```

## Signature

```ts
function committedFactJournalCursorCodec(stream: string): CommittedFactJournalCursorCodec<CommittedFactJournalCursor>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `stream` | `string` | Stable domain-owned stream identifier. |

## Returns

A strict fact-position cursor codec scoped to `stream`.

## Example

```ts
import { committedFactJournalCursorCodec } from "@graphrefly/ts/committed-facts";

const cursor = committedFactJournalCursorCodec("work-facts").initial();
```
